subcodes.first_line: O Ghulam-Husayn, thou who art named servant of the Blessed Beauty and hast attained, in thy highest aspiration, unto the bounties of the Lord of all the worlds! As a servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غلام حسین بنام غلام جمال مبارکی و بکام فائز بموهبت خداوند عالم چون بنده
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Mosaic imagery
